plsc-intro.label: Introductory Core Courses
plsc-intro.note: Three of four intro courses: PLSC 100 (Political Theory), 101 (American Politics), 102 (International Relations), 103 (Comparative Politics)

plsc-subfield-american.label: American Politics Subfield
plsc-subfield-american.note: One upper-level course in the American Politics subfield

plsc-subfield-theory.label: Political Theory Subfield
plsc-subfield-theory.note: One upper-level course in the Political Theory subfield

plsc-subfield-comparative.label: Comparative Politics Subfield
plsc-subfield-comparative.note: One upper-level course in the Comparative Politics subfield

plsc-subfield-ir.label: International Relations Subfield
plsc-subfield-ir.note: One upper-level course in the International Relations subfield
